name: Daily Udhaar Summary
query:
SELECT
    DATE(ue.date) as "Date:Date:120",
    ue.entry_type as "Entry Type::150",
    COUNT(ue.name) as "Transactions:Int:80",
    SUM(ue.amount) as "Total Amount:Currency:120"
FROM
    `tabUdhaar Entry` ue
WHERE
    ue.docstatus = 1
    AND ue.date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
GROUP BY
    DATE(ue.date),
    ue.entry_type
ORDER BY
    DATE(ue.date) DESC
